name: SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. Warrants
summary: SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. Warrants entitle the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock of SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. at a specified price. SportsMap Tech Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Warrants are often issued as part of a unit offering.
